coordinates.image: X left-to-right; positive world Z points upward

generation.collision_model: 16-direction, radius-3, 200 m sphere sweeps over serialized TerrainCollider geometry and packaged placed-prefab collision footprints
limitations: offline reconstruction cannot reproduce every Unity monument and underwater-lab collider
only colliders present during WorldSetup affect this route; later SpawnHandler populations and loaded saves do not
smooth patrol simulates normal ocean steering only; harbor docking, spawn transients, and egress are separate runtime states
